talents.name: Brimming Vitality
talents.desc: Increases Energy REG SPD by 20%.

talents.name: Intellect Conversion
talents.desc: Every 10 points of Intellect provides 1 point of MATK.

talents.name: Inspiration
talents.desc: Applies Inspiration to yourself and allies within 30 meters.

talents.name: Regen Bud
talents.desc: Casting a Special Attack grants 1 Regen Bud. Initial cap of Regen Buds: 4. When an Expertise Skill or Ultimate generates healing, 2 Regen Buds are consumed to throw a Nourishing Seed, triggering up to once per second. When an Expertise Skill or Ultimate deals DMG, 2 Regen Buds are consumed to shoot a Wild Seed, once per second.

talents.name: Breath of Buds
talents.desc: Increases Max Regen Bud by 4.

talents.name: Nature Shield
talents.desc: When Wild Bloom heals a target, it also applies Nature Shield to them. Targets with Nature Shield restore HP when hit, with the amount equal to 10% of your ATK. This effect can occur up to once per second.

talents.name: Arcane of Green
talents.desc: When Feral Seed deals DMG, it increases the DMG dealt by Infusion, Wild Bloom, Stag Charge in the next 10s by 20%.

talents.name: Healing Breath
talents.desc: When a Special Attack, Expertise Skill, or Ultimate generates Healing, there is a 20% to trigger Healing Chain. For every 2% Luck, the chance +1%.

talents.name: Wild Blessing
talents.desc: Wild Bloom now holds up to 2 charges. Wild Bloom's Energy cost -15%.

talents.name: Flourish
talents.desc: When Infusion, Feral Seed, or Wild Bloom deals DMG, 30% chance to reduce the CD of the Ultimate by 1s, once per second.

talents.name: Smite Spec
talents.desc: Further enhances the ability to use Wild Bloom. Wild Bloom, Regen Pulse, and ​Nature Ward​ grant Symbiotic Mark to allies. Symbiotic Mark: Lasts for 10s. All of the caster's DMG will heal allies with Symbiotic Mark for 45% of the DMG dealt. Increases the final DMG of Lucky Strikes by 50%. When overhealing a target with Symbiotic Mark, if the overheal reaches 30% of their Max HP, the excess healing is converted into a regeneration effect lasting for 10s. This effect can trigger only once every 30s. Healing of Stillness: If the caster deals no DMG to enemies for 5s, each hit of the caster's Basic Attack will heal up to 10 allies (party members prioritized), with the 4-hit combo restoring 12.6% Max HP in total. Capable of converting attacks into healing. Lucky Strikes from attacks trigger various healing effects, enhancing healing while increasing DMG dealt.

talents.name: Double Infusion
talents.desc: After casting Stag Charge, the number of channels for the next Infusion +100%.

talents.name: Final Bloomwheel
talents.desc: When Wild Bloom deals DMG, reduces the remaining CD of Infusion by 1s. If the DMG triggers a Lucky Strike, the Resistance becomes 3s.

talents.name: Verdant Root
talents.desc: While in battle state, standing still for 2s creates a Grass Domain. Grass Domain: While inside the Grass Domain, your Haste +10%. Upon exiting the Grass Domain, your Movement SPD +50% for 0.5s, and Grass Domain disappears.

talents.name: Full Bloom
talents.desc: Casting Life Bloom grants a fixed 50% chance to reduce the CD of Blossom Charge and Regen Pulse by 2s.

talents.name: Healing Infusion
talents.desc: Every 5 uses of Life Bloom enhances the next direct healing Expertise Skill by 100%.

talents.name: Verdant Duet
talents.desc: Life Bloom has a fixed 20% chance to heal 1 additional time.

talents.name: Floral Whisper
talents.desc: Healing Expertise generate 20% more healing, but healing from Life Bloom -50%.

talents.name: Lifeforce Extension
talents.desc: Increases the Healing of Healing Chain by 10%. For every 7% Mastery, Healing Chain jumps 1 additional time. Healing Chain restores 1% of an ally's Max HP with each tick.

talents.name: Nourish Essence
talents.desc: When Life Bloom generates healing, 50% chance to apply Nourish.

talents.name: Endless Blossom
talents.desc: When casting Blossom Charge, Grove Wish, or Regen Pulse, 20% chance that the next cast of Life Bloom within 5s consumes no Energy.

talents.name: Stag Charge
talents.desc: After triggering a total of 10 Nourishing Seeds or Wild Seeds, Wild Bloom evolves into Stag Charge. Casting Stag Charge instants grants 3 Regen Buds.

talents.name: Wings of Revival
talents.desc: When an ally within 20 meters takes DMG exceeding 30% of their HP, Revival triggers, which can affect the same target up to once every 45s. Revival: Restores HP equal to 50% of the DMG taken over 5s.

talents.name: Natural Bloom
talents.desc: When healing an ally with lower than 30% HP, Natural Bloom triggers, instantly restoring HP equal to 200% ATK to them. This effect can occur up to once every 30s.

talents.name: Healing Pulse
talents.desc: When an enemy within 10 meters that you are engaged with is defeated (effective within a team), generates a Healing Pulse. This can only occur once every 10s.

talents.name: Gift of Life
talents.desc: When an enemy within 10 meters that you are engaged with is defeated (effective within a team), generates a Healing Orb. This can only occur once every 2s.

talents.name: Bud Acquisition
talents.desc: When an enemy within 10 meters that you are engaged with is defeated (effective within a team), generates an Engram Orb, which grants 1 Regen Bud upon pickup.

talents.name: Defensive Blessing
talents.desc: Inspiration provides the target with an additional 380 Armor.

talents.name: Flowers Ascension
talents.desc: When Wild Seed deals DMG or Nourishing Seed generates healing, you gain a 10% Forest DMG bonus for the next 8s.

talents.name: Lifebind Spec
talents.desc: Replace Special Attack with Life Bloom and enhances the skill. Life Bloom generates 20% more healing. Casting Life Bloom grants 1 additional Regen Bud. Whenever safety allows, aim to cast as many healing skills as possible. Haste increases cast speed, and Mastery enhances healing potency.

talents.name: Thorn
talents.desc: When Wild Seed hits a target, it inflicts Thorn on them. Verdant DMG dealt by players to targets with Thorn +20%.

talents.name: Vital Surge
talents.desc: Replace Ultimate, Divine Circle Bloom with Vital Surge.

talents.name: Verdant Blessing
talents.desc: When HP of an ally with Inspiration drops below 20%, Blessing triggers. Blessing: Grants a Nature Shield and reduces the DMG taken by 35% for 8s, once every 60s.

talents.name: Bloomheal
talents.desc: Replace Ultimate, Divine Circle Bloom with Bloomheal.

talents.name: Dancing Seed
talents.desc: When a DMG-type Expertise Skill triggers Lucky Strike, next Wild Seed launches 1 more projectile. For every 5 Nourishing Seeds thrown, next Nourishing Seed throws 1 more projectile.

talents.name: Energy Surge
talents.desc: Every 2% haste provides 1% energy natural recovery efficiency.

talents.name: Regeneration Bud
talents.desc: When dealing damage with Basic Attacks, 10% chance to gain 1 Regen Bud.

talents.name: Omnipotent Breath
talents.desc: When Intellect reaches 500, versatility +4%.

talents.name: Shelter
talents.desc: Within 5s after Casting Infusion, the damage absorption of the Nature Shield added by Wild Bloom or Nature Ward is doubled.

talents.name: Pulse Breath
talents.desc: If equipped with Regen Pulse skill, Nature Ward and Ultimates will trigger Regen Pulse when their CDs are completed.

talents.name: Feral Seed Symbiosis
talents.desc: When active Symbiotic Marks reach 5 or more, ​Feral Seed​ and Wild Seed DMG increases by 100%.

talents.name: Wild Protection
talents.desc: The charge count of Nature Ward +1. The charge time of Nature Ward decreases by 5s.

talents.name: Wide-area Thorns
talents.desc: Successful hit of Feral Seed on the targets with Thorn spreads Thorn to other units within 10 meters.

talents.name: Thornbreaker
talents.desc: Infusion and Stag Charge deal double DMG to Thorned targets, but the healing conversion of Infusion and Stag Charge is halved.

talents.name: Pulse Duality
talents.desc: When Regen Pulse is actively used, it spreads twice.

talents.name: Swift Shelter
talents.desc: Each use or trigger of Regen Pulse, reduces the CD of Nature Ward by 2s.

talents.name: Pulse Retrospect
talents.desc: Regen Pulse returns to your position after it reaches the max distance. Regen Pulse now deals DMG to enemies.

talents.name: Swift Bud
talents.desc: Each Regen Bud gained, reduces the CD of Feral Seed by 1 second.

talents.name: Breath of Symbiosis
talents.desc: Symbiotic Mark enhances Healingiveness by 2%. Each 5% Mastery enhances Healingiveness by 1%.

talents.name: Symbiosis Extension
talents.desc: Each Wild Seed fired extends the duration of activated Symbiotic Mark by 1s.

talents.name: Pulse Echo
talents.desc: When dealing DMG, Infusion grants 1 stack of Pulse Echo. Pulse Echo: Increases DMG dealt of Regen Pulse by 20%, which lasts 12s and stacks up to 5 times.

talents.name: Luck Damage
talents.desc: Lucky Strike DMG Multiplier +5%. Every 1% Luck grants 1% Lucky Strike DMG Multiplier.

talents.name: Verdant Impact
talents.desc: For every 20 stacks of Pulse Echo gained, the next actively cast Regen Pulse triggers a Blossom Charge at both the nearest enemy and the Ally with lowest HP.

talents.name: Wild Luck
talents.desc: When Wild Bloom or Regen Pulse deal DMG, grants a chance (equal to the half percentage of Luck) to gain 1 Regen Bud. If the target is affected by Thorn, doubles the chance.

talents.name: Verdant Nourishment
talents.desc: If you're affected with Nourish, reduces all DMG taken by 10%. If the targets are affected by Nourish, enhances their Healing Received from yourself by 5%. If the stack of Nourish is above or equal to 3, additionally enhances Healing Received by 3%.

talents.name: Ultimate Inspiration
talents.desc: Doubles the effectiveness of Inspiration.

talents.name: Life Bloom
talents.desc: Using Blossom Charge enhances the next Life Bloom, skipping the cast and increasing the Healing by 50%.

talents.name: Vitality
talents.desc: Nourish can stack up to 5 times. Each use of Life Bloom grants the targets with Nourish 1 stack of Nourish.

talents.name: Flourishing Progress
talents.desc: When holding 2 or more Regen Buds, casting Blossom Charge for damage or healing always triggers a corresponding seed (without costing Regen Buds) and grants 1 Regen Bud.

talents.name: Blooming Reincarnation
talents.desc: Casting Life Bloom increases Life Bloom's healing by 20% and its Energy consumed by 10% for 4s. This effect can stack up to 5 times.

talents.name: Energy Arcane
talents.desc: During Growth Arcane, increases Energy REG SPD by 50%. Increases Grove Wish's Crit by 10%

talents.name: Transcendence
talents.desc: Every 60 self-heals from Nourish grants Transcendence.

talents.name: Flourishing Flower
talents.desc: Within Grass Domain, Flower Stalk appeared 50% earlier.

talents.name: Tricolor Revelation
talents.desc: Consumes Moonlight Solace to launch Flower Dance - Tricolor Revelation. Flower Dance - Tricolor Revelation: Grants all effects of Flower Stalks, once every 60s.

talents.name: Flower Time Dance
talents.desc: Every 45s, generates 1 Flower Stalk in the following order: Crimson Insight, Golden Devotion, and Moonlight Solace.

talents.name: Bud to Blossom
talents.desc: When a Flower Stalk appears, grants 1 Regen Bud every 2s for 10s.

talents.name: Inspire and Strengthen
talents.desc: Inspiration grants 100 bonus Intellect, Strength, Agility, and Endurance.

talents.name: Energy Expansion
talents.desc: Increases Max Energy by 20. Using Blossom Charge restores 30% lost Energy.

talents.name: Rescue
talents.desc: Healing Expertise restore 25% more HP to the targets with HP below 50%.

talents.name: Instant Bloom
talents.desc: Every 5 uses of Life Bloom accelerates the using of Grove Wish or Regen Pulse by 100% and increases their Healing by 50% in 15s.
